productDisplayName: Casio Men Steel Watch EX045 EFR-502D-7AVDF
description: Case style: Analogue watch, has a circular case and a stainless steel backDial style: White dial, has glow-in-the-dark inlays on hour and minute hands, three mock subdials for day, date and 24-hour time and two mock push-buttonsFeatures: A screw to reset the time and a date apertureStrap style: Silver bracelet-style stainless steel strap, secured with a butterfly clasp Water resistance up to 100 meters, allowing you to use it when swimming Warranty: 1 yearWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
